free_text: High energy gamma-ray production from Be, C, and Al
- Solid angle of detector is 7.85 msr.
- E-RSL: in the energy range from 25 to 76MeV
- Calibration: The on-line calibration of the energy
scale of 12C(15.1MeV, T=1, Jpi=1+). A broad peak
corresponding to the energy deposited in a BaF2
crystal by cosmic muons were also used for a
Ay + Am. Data converted from NRDF D1709
ANG is polar angle between beam and prompt gamma in
